## Reviewing PRs

When reviewing PRs, please ensure that you respond always in friendly and constructive manner.
First thank the contributor for their contribution in a enthusiastic way. Then, if you have any suggestions for improvement, please provide them in a clear and concise way. If you have any questions about the PR, please ask them in a respectful way. Let them know that we have a lot of PRs to review and that we appreciate their patience while we review their contribution.
